name: Dagwood Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf best-quality sliced whole grain bread
1/2 pound imported Emmenthaler or Jarlsberg cheese, thinly sliced
1 head romaine lettuce, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mustard on one side of a slice of whole grain bread.
2. Spread salad dressing on one side of another slice of whole grain bread.
3. Mix mayonnaise with basil and spread onto both sides of a slice of sourdough bread.
4. Arrange a slice of turkey, a slice of cheese, and two spinach leaves on the whole grain bread slice with mustard.
5. Place the sourdough slice on top, followed by a leaf of romaine lettuce and a slice of ham.
6. Cover with the remaining whole grain bread slice.
7. Secure the sandwich with two bamboo skewers.
8. Repeat steps 1-7 to make a total of 8 double-decker sandwiches.
